words.meaning_en: Harmful substances introduced into the environment
To process used items so they can be used again
words.example_sentence: We should recycle paper and plastic.

words.meaning_en: Unwanted material left over after use
words.example_sentence: Do not waste food or water.

words.meaning_en: A living organism that grows in the ground and has leaves
words.example_sentence: She watered the plant every morning.

words.meaning_en: A gas in the air that living things need to breathe
A long period with little or no rain
words.example_sentence: The farmers suffered because of the drought.

words.meaning_en: A large amount of water covering normally dry land
words.example_sentence: The flood destroyed many homes in the village.

words.meaning_en: A sudden shaking of the ground caused by movement of the earth
The remains of a prehistoric animal or plant preserved in rock
words.example_sentence: Scientists found a dinosaur fossil in the desert.

words.meaning_en: A natural substance found in rocks and the earth
words.example_sentence: Iron is an important mineral found in the ground.

words.meaning_en: The layer of air and gases surrounding the Earth
words.example_sentence: The atmosphere protects us from the sun's rays.

words.meaning_en: The natural place where an animal or plant lives
words.example_sentence: The forest is the natural habitat of the tiger.

words.meaning_en: The gradual wearing away of soil or rock by water or wind
words.example_sentence: Heavy rain caused soil erosion on the hillside.

words.meaning_en: The protection of nature, animals, and natural resources
words.example_sentence: Water conservation is important in dry areas.
